pipeline_status.poller: QUIET (17th consecutive). Dome at V51.1, 69 WINs, 94.5% accuracy unchanged. Canary cold.
pipeline_status.analyst: Proposals processed: ISS-1033/1034 resolution via EXP-165/166 integration, tracker dedup. Attention inbox: 3 items for WIN-027/068/044.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes detected. All automated commits (status_history.json, monitoring output). No manual commits, no model changes.

SEC-6.6 denominator exclusion not preempted — fixed by EXP-166 CERN preemption paragraph.

TLDR cited 21% unexplained error for superseded V50.4 formula. FIXED this run.
Cascade paragraphs (Self-Contradicted grade) inside Std Model Explains verdict. FIXED this run — demoted to Section 1.8 cross-reference.
detail_evidence led with Misleading-era framing despite Self-Contradicted verdict. FIXED this run — rewritten to lead with version-instability.
Cross-WIN parameter count inconsistency (WIN-027 vs WIN-057 different parameter lists for V50.6 H(r)).
WIN-068 detail_evidence P3 discusses E001-E009 future predictions — off-topic for historical ensemble WIN.
WIN-010 and WIN-025 lack Section 1.8 cross-reference that WIN-068 now has. Inconsistent presentation of cascade argument.
